user.title: Crypto Portfolio
user.description: Create a portfolio and paste your holdings as JSON. Use a CoinGecko coin ID such as bitcoin, ethereum or cardano. Common ticker symbols such as BTC and ETH are also accepted.

error.invalid_holdings: Holdings JSON is invalid. It must be a non-empty list with coin_id, symbol, amount and invested.

init.title: Crypto Portfolio options
init.description: Choose what you want to edit. Holdings file: `{holdings_file}`. [Open File editor]({file_editor_url})

settings.title: General settings
settings.description: Edit portfolio name, currency and update interval.

advanced_json.title: Advanced JSON editor
advanced_json.description: [Open File editor]({file_editor_url}) and edit `{holdings_file}`. Reopen this editor to load external changes. Saving here updates the file and the integration.

error.cannot_remove_last: At least one holding is required.
error.invalid_coin: Coin values are invalid. Check coin ID, symbol, amount and invested.
error.invalid_holdings: Holdings JSON is invalid. It must be a non-empty list with coin_id, symbol, amount and invested.
error.invalid_holdings_file: The holdings JSON file could not be read or contains invalid holdings.
